statement: In every magma, Equation 1351 (`x = y * (((z * x) * x) * z)`) implies Equation 3861 (`x * y = (z * w) * (u * v)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0743
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op u v))
